title: Workload View
excerpt: Is there a way to tweak the Workload View in Monday? My Workload view is only showing the current and past weeks’ data. I want to have visibility on the upcoming weeks as well, to see who’s going to be busy, who’s got so…

posts.author: happiruelos (Happi)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to tweak the Workload View in Monday? My Workload view is only showing the current and past weeks’ data. I want to have visibility on the upcoming weeks as well, to see who’s going to be busy, who’s got some extra time in the next 2 weeks to work on other things.

posts.author: jailynnhoops (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good morning Happi!

It sounds like you might be having some issues with the filters on your workload widget. There are several things that could be affecting your widget. Can you provide a screenshot of your settings and filters?

posts.author: happiruelos (Happi)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, thanks for this. I was able to figure it out. I noticed my data doesn’t have a Timeline column. Although I have a Date Started & Deadline column. Is there a way to automate the Timeline column?

posts.author: jailynnhoops (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml: There is with a third party app called Start+End=Timeline. It’s a one time payment and works great!
